text: Best for hotels. Huge selection, clear pricing. Property quality has been consistent. Free cancellation on most bookings. Use it for every trip.
Great hotel inventory. Price transparency is good. Had one issue with a property — support resolved it in 24 hours. Reliable.
Love the unique stays. App is intuitive. Host communication is easy. Cancellation policy varies — read carefully. Best for apartments and homes.
Had a dispute with a host. Support took 2 weeks to resolve. No phone number. Great when it works, nightmare when it doesn't.
Bundles save money. Flight + hotel deals are good. Price transparency is decent. Customer support was helpful with a change.
One-stop for travel. Rewards program adds value. Property quality varies. Cancellation process was straightforward.
Property quality is top notch. Reviews are reliable. Ease of use is excellent. Best hotel booking experience.
Unique accommodations. App is easy. Support can be slow. Cancellation policies vary by host. Good for longer stays.
Bundles are good value. Interface is clunky. Had to call support for a refund — took 3 weeks. Price transparency could be better.
Huge selection. Clear pricing. Property quality generally good. Support responded within 24 hours. Solid choice.
Best for unique stays. Hosts are responsive. Cancellation was easy when plans changed. Love the variety.
Rewards add up. Flight and hotel bundles save money. Customer support was adequate. Good for package deals.
Best hotel app. Property quality, ease of use, value — all top tier. Free cancellation gives peace of mind.
Great for groups and longer stays. Kitchen saves money. Support could be faster. Overall positive.
Price transparency is okay. Bundles are competitive. Property quality varies. Cancellation policy was clear.
Reliable for hotels. Reviews are helpful. Support resolved a double-charge quickly. Recommend.
Place was not as described. Support was slow. Got partial refund after 2 weeks. Hit or miss.
Best bundle deals. Saved 200 on flight+hotel. Rewards program is worthwhile. Good value for money.
Property quality is consistently good. Ease of use is best in class. Price transparency. My go-to for hotels.
Best for unique stays. App experience is smooth. Support varies. Good for apartments and vacation homes.
